trans-unit.source: This module explores the principles and practical applications of spatial network analysis within a GIS framework. The first chapter introduces spatial network theory, where you will learn the foundational concepts of how spatial relationships are modeled and analyzed. The second chapter delves into the use of OpenRouteService (ORS), a powerful tool for calculating routes and analyzing accessibility in real-world geographic networks. Finally, the module concludes with an examination of network centrality measures, equipping you with the ability to evaluate the importance and influence of individual elements within a spatial network. By the end of this module, you'll be able to apply these tools and theories to solve complex spatial network problems.
trans-unit.target: This module explores the principles and practical applications of spatial network analysis within a GIS framework. The first chapter introduces spatial network theory, where you will learn the foundational concepts of how spatial relationships are modeled and analyzed. The second chapter delves into the use of OpenRouteService (ORS), a powerful tool for calculating routes and analyzing accessibility in real-world geographic networks. Finally, the module concludes with an examination of network centrality measures, equipping you with the ability to evaluate the importance and influence of individual elements within a spatial network. By the end of this module, you'll be able to apply these tools and theories to solve complex spatial network problems.

trans-unit.source: Know what is meant by spatial network analysis, know the components of a network graph, understand the Dijkstra algorithm, Know the ORS plugin
trans-unit.target: Know what is meant by spatial network analysis, know the components of a network graph, understand the Dijkstra algorithm, Know the ORS plugin

trans-unit.source: Know how to install the plugin, Know how to set up your own API key, know how to configure the plugin
trans-unit.target: Know how to install the plugin, Know how to set up your own API key, know how to configure the plugin

trans-unit.source: __[Chapter 3: Network centrality measures and its application in QGIS](/content/Module_9/en_qgis_centrality.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Chapter 3: Network centrality measures and its application in QGIS](/content/Module_9/en_qgis_centrality.md)__

trans-unit.source: Understand common network metrics, Know how to apply them to gain information about spatial networks
trans-unit.target: Understand common network metrics, Know how to apply them to gain information about spatial networks
